utilities.note: electric + water + internet; reasonable for Balkans

coworking.note: limited coworking options; work from cafes common

simData.note: BH Telecom or m:tel SIM; cheap data plans

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Inland Balkan capital; mild seasonality.

evidence.claim: 1BR city centre €300–€500/mo; avg $536; budget nomad $850/mo possible
evidence.quote: For a 1-bedroom apartment in the city center, rent ranges from €300–€500 per month. Budget nomads can live in Sarajevo for $850/month by renting outside the centre ($542)

evidence.claim: cheap restaurant meal $5; cappuccino $2; comfortable nomad €800–€1,200/mo
evidence.quote: A cheap restaurant meal costs $5, while a mid-range dinner for two runs about $11, and coffee culture is incredibly cheap at $2 per cappuccino. Sarajevo costs €800–€1,200/month for a single expat

evidence.claim: groceries €150–€200/mo; Sarajevo one of Europe's most affordable capitals
evidence.quote: Groceries cost €150–€200 per month. Sarajevo is positioned as one of Europe's most affordable capitals for digital nomads in 2026

evidence.claim: Bosnia 10% flat tax; digital nomad guide including coworking options
